channel.title: Devyansh's Blog
channel.description: A collection of thoughts on Linux, Open Source, and Cyber Security.

item.title: Welcome to my Blog
item.description: This is the first post on my new Astro blog.

item.title: Does x86-64-v3 Really Matter? Benchmarking Standard Arch Linux vs a Fully Optimized CachyOS Stack
item.description: Is the CachyOS kernel actually faster than the official Linux Mainline kernel? I benchmark boot time, CPU performance, memory, compression, decompression, file I/O, gaming, compilation and power usage with reproducible tests.
